news_items.headline: Yankees, Aaron Boone embracing ‘grind’ of not letting ‘terrible weekend’ snowball
news_items.summary: After seeing his club swept in four games at Fenway Park, manager Aaron Boone said the Yankees must embrace the grind of working out of the funk of losing eight out of 11: "You gotta eat this stuff up. It’s a sickness."

news_items.headline: Red Sox rally past Yankees 5-4 in 10 innings to complete 4-game sweep after Gray loses no-hit bid
news_items.summary: Boston’s first four-game sweep of the Yankees at home since 2018 also marked its first four-game winning streak this season.

news_items.headline: LA Dodgers' Dave Roberts closes in on managerial milestone
news_items.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers manager Dave Roberts is closing in on his 1,000th managerial career victory.

news_items.headline: Argument between former teammates Josh Naylor and Austin Hedges gets personal in Mariners-Guardians
news_items.summary: Naylor and Hedges played four seasons together on the Padres and Guardians.

news_items.headline: Red Sox Walk Off Yankees In Ten Innings To Clinch Series Sweep
news_items.summary: This baseball game had a lot of things that most baseball games don’t have. Here’s a list of those things. 1. A No-Hit Bid Sonny Gray took a no-hitter into the eighth inning. He had everything working for him. His fastball and cutter each held strike rates over 80%, while his sweeper and curveball returned […]
